{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 2, "R1.4": 2, "R1.7": 1, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {"R1.1": "Fails to identify a clear conceptual issue or propose a tighter framing. Mostly restates surface phrasing.", "R1.4": "Names one prior work but doesn't articulate a clear delta compared to it.", "R1.7": "No citations are provided despite numerous claims about prior work.", "RX.1": "Presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty.", "RX.3": "Mostly covers the requested dimensions but drifts into discussing motivation and future directions.", "RX.4": "No regressions or harmful content identified.", "RX.5": "Does not provide traceability for any of the claims made."},
  "confidence": {"R1.1": 0.9, "R1.4": 0.8, "R1.7": 0.9, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.8, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.9},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Fails to identify a clear conceptual issue or propose a tighter framing. Mostly restates surface phrasing.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work but doesn't articulate a clear delta compared to it.
rationale.R1.7: No citations are provided despite numerous claims about prior work.
rationale.RX.1: Presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly covers the requested dimensions but drifts into discussing motivation and future directions.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content identified.
rationale.RX.5: Does not provide traceability for any of the claims made.
